description: Golden test set for Ragas evaluation. question/reference are benchmark inputs; answer/contexts can be precomputed or generated by the RAG system at runtime.

test_cases.question: What is Modular RAG?
test_cases.reference: Modular RAG is a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system built with modular, pluggable components that can be configured and swapped independently.

test_cases.question: What is hybrid search and how does it work?
test_cases.reference: Hybrid search combines dense retrieval with sparse BM25 keyword matching, then fuses results using Reciprocal Rank Fusion for better recall.
